no: Diablo 2 Assassin kit for Thief class. Human, Half-elf only. Charge-up martial arts with finishing moves, trap-laying, shadow companion. Skill points system: one per level up to 3M XP. Part of Shohy's Diablo2 Kit Pack Series. Author confirms EET compatibility. Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

passive.desc: +25% Open Locks and Hide in Shadows
Auto 2 slots Two Weapon Style. Can specialize in thief melee weapons.

activated.effects: Tiger Strike, Dragon Talon/Flight, Cobra Strike, Fists of Fire, Claws of Thunder, Blades of Ice, Phoenix Strike.
Fire Blast, Shock Web, Blade Sentinel, Death Sentry, Shadow Warrior/Master summons, Burst of Speed, Cloak of Shadows.

restrictions.items: No backstab. No standard Thief HLAs except Use Any Item. No dual-class.

spellRestrictions.note: D2-style assassin uses martial arts and traps, no spellcasting.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool. No standard Thief HLAs except Use Any Item per research.

statBonus.note: +0.5 APR at lv1 and lv15. +25% Open Locks and Hide. Auto 2 slots Two Weapon Style.

new: Diablo 2-inspired martial artist. Trap-laying, martial arts, and shadow disciplines.

sum: Diablo 2-inspired Assassin kit for the Thief class. Human, Half-elf only. Charge-up martial arts with finishing moves, trap-laying, and shadow companion.

co.n: Extend the enemy level limit of Corpse Explosion casted by Death Sentry to LV32
co.tp2n: Extend the enemy level limit of Corpse Explosion casted by Death Sentry to LV32
co.no: Requires main kit component installed first

co.n: Turns off the white wiffle ball animation of Weapon Block
co.tp2n: Turns off the white wiffle ball animation of Weapon Block
